citation: Hwang, J.-Y. & Yang, K.-S. (2004), Numerical study of vortical structures around a wall-mounted cubic obstacle in channel flow, Physics of Fluids 16(7) 2382-2394.
what_to_digitize: Horseshoe-vortex separation distance, vortex count vs Re, floor critical points
regime_note: Laminar/early-transitional channel; closest published regime to the Re=500-3000 ladder. VERIFY citation + Re definition before use.

citation: Liakos, A. & Malamataris, N. A. (2014), Direct numerical simulation of steady state, three dimensional, laminar flow around a wall mounted cube, Physics of Fluids 26, 053603.
what_to_digitize: Separation/reattachment lengths, wake topology at low Re
regime_note: Steady laminar regime; spans the lower rungs. VERIFY citation + confinement ratio.

citation: Yakhot, A., Liu, H. & Nikitin, N. (2006), Turbulent flow around a wall-mounted cube: a direct numerical simulation, Int. J. Heat and Fluid Flow 27(6) 994-1009.
what_to_digitize: Mean velocity profiles, reattachment length, Cd at Re_h=5610
regime_note: DNS above the ladder top (Re_h=5610); use for extrapolation context only, not direct comparison.

citation: Yakhot, A., Anor, T., Liu, H. & Nikitin, N. (2006), Direct numerical simulation of turbulent flow around a wall-mounted cube: spatio-temporal evolution of large-scale vortices, J. Fluid Mech. 566, 1-9.
what_to_digitize: Shedding dynamics / Strouhal context near the ladder top

citation: Martinuzzi, R. & Tropea, C. (1993), The flow around surface-mounted prismatic obstacles placed in a fully developed channel flow, J. Fluids Eng. 115(1) 85-92.
what_to_digitize: Methodology for separation-line mapping; high-Re reference topology
regime_note: Re_h ~ 40000 - far above the ladder; methodology + qualitative topology only.

citation: Meinders, E. R. & Hanjalic, K. (1999), Vortex structure and heat transfer in turbulent flow over a wall-mounted matrix of cubes, Int. J. Heat and Fluid Flow 20(3) 255-267.
regime_note: Matrix of cubes, not isolated; context only.
